topics.name: 100 Level: Foundations of Accounting and Business Communication
topics.description: ACC 101 Financial Accounting I, BUS 101 Business Communication, ECO 111 Introduction to Economics.

subtopics.name: ACC 101: Bookkeeping and Preparation of Financial Statements
objectives: Record transactions using double-entry bookkeeping in journals and ledger accounts
Prepare and interpret trial balance, income statement, and statement of financial position

subtopics.name: ECO 111: Fundamentals of Micro and Macroeconomics for Accounting
objectives: Explain supply, demand, market equilibrium, and pricing theory for business decision making
Identify macroeconomic indicators — GDP, inflation, interest rates — and their effect on accounting

topics.name: 200–300 Level: Cost Accounting, Taxation, and Management Accounting
topics.description: ACC 201 Cost Accounting, ACC 211 Taxation, ACC 301 Management Accounting, ACC 311 Auditing I.

subtopics.name: ACC 201 & ACC 301: Cost and Management Accounting
objectives: Calculate job, process, activity-based, and marginal costs for manufacturing and service firms
Prepare budgets, variance analyses, and performance reports for management decision-making

subtopics.name: ACC 211 & ACC 311: Taxation and Auditing
objectives: Calculate personal income tax, companies income tax, and value added tax (VAT) liabilities
Plan and execute audit engagements using risk-based auditing standards (ISAs and FRC Nigeria)

topics.name: 400 Level: Advanced Financial Reporting, Finance, and Research Project
topics.description: ACC 401 Advanced Financial Reporting (IFRS), FIN 411 Corporate Finance, ACC 499 Research Project.

subtopics.name: ACC 401: IFRS Compliant Financial Reporting
objectives: Prepare consolidated financial statements for groups of companies under IFRS 3 and IFRS 10
Account for leases, financial instruments, and deferred tax in accordance with IFRS 16 and IAS 12

subtopics.name: ACC 499: Undergraduate Research Dissertation
objectives: Conduct empirical or theoretical accounting research with proper literature review and methodology
Present and defend original research before UNILAG Faculty of Business Administration examiners
